infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CivicVox uses the camera to capture incident footage for AI analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CivicVox uses your location to pin the incident on the map and find nearby hydrants.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CivicVox uses the microphone for voice dispatch.

plugins.cameraPermission: CivicVox uses the camera to capture incident footage.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: CivicVox uses your location to map the incident.
